title: Support auth file environment variable in related podman commands & add change to man pages
body: This commit fixes #1340 when podman pull

comments.body: @QiWang19 it looks like git still doesn't think you've signed your commit still.  You might try `git commit --amend -s` again with a fetch, rebase and push .
Openshift CI seems to be having networking issues?

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Changes LGTM, but we should document it in the man pages.
LGTM @umohnani8 FWIW, I believe @QiWang19 's plan is to add the call to a number of other commands to and to then handle the man page changes.
@TomSweeneyRedHat @umohnani8 Yes. I'll do that. Thank you
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #1619) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
I removed the comment and changed the ```GetAuthFile``` to ```getAuthFile```. Is it ok that I continue with these changes?
